prompt:
改写这段话，学科：生态安全格局

The ecological source is the core area of habitat. The ecological corridor connects different habitats. The ecological resistance surface affects the movement of species. The landscape connectivity is important for biodiversity conservation.

assertions.text: Preserves 'ecological resistance surface' exactly as written
Uses domain-specific vocabulary (e.g., habitat patch, biotope)
No more than 5 consecutive words match the original
